description: Adversarial: the prompt says 'automate' but describes reasoning-dominated investigation; the agent must classify by behavior, not vocabulary.

conversation.text: Automate a bot that investigates production incidents end-to-end.

processExpectations: The agent explains that despite the request using the word 'automate', the end-to-end incident investigation is reasoning-dominated work, creating legitimate ambiguity about which primitive owns the top-level control flow.
The agent does not classify the request as workflow-anchored with no embedded agent merely because the prompt uses the word 'automate'.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
